---
pagetitle: "Workshop 2026 - JutulDarcy.jl Hands-on"
toc: true
toc-location: right
page-layout: article
---

::: {.page-header}
[Hands-on Workshop]{.page-header-badge .badge-upcoming}

# JutulDarcy.jl - High-performance porous media and reservoir simulator based on automatic differentiation

[Olav Møyner · SINTEF Digital]{.tagline}

::: {.meta}
[Day 1]{} [June 1, 2026]{} [Hands-on exercises]{} [60 min]{}
:::

::: {.actions}
[Back to Programme](../2026.qmd#programme){.btn-act .secondary}
[Instructor Profile](https://olavmoyner.com/){.btn-act .primary target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.content-body .session-detail}

## Overview

This hands-on session introduces JutulDarcy.jl, a high-performance porous media and reservoir simulator based on automatic differentiation.

**Duration:** 60 minutes

## Abstract

Abstract will be updated later.

## Instructor Bio

[Olav Møyner](https://olavmoyner.com/) is a Senior Research Scientist in the Applied Computational Sciences group at SINTEF Digital, a not-for-profit independent research institute in Norway.

Research interests include:

- Solution methods for coupled, nonlinear partial differential equations (PDEs)
- Automatic differentiation and adjoint methods
- Software design of industry-grade simulators
- Flow and transport in porous media, with applications in hydrocarbon recovery, carbon capture and sequestration, geothermal energy, and groundwater flow
- Numerical simulation of batteries
- Discretizations for unstructured meshes (high-order and consistent schemes)

## Materials and Instructions

- Slides: To be added.
- Notebooks or scripts: To be added.
- Data: To be added.

:::
